title: Dhan parent enters insurance broking with GreenLife acquisition
summary: Raise Financial, parent of stock trading platform Dhan, has acquired GreenLife Insurance for approximately $15 million in a cash and stock deal. This strategic move aims to build a direct consumer and insurance distribution business, leveraging GreenLife's decade-long expertise.

The investment underscores strong confidence in their innovative approach to tackling diseases.
